subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Thy letter was received, and an answer hath been penned to Mullá Jahán. Assuredly it will reach him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی نامه شما رسید جوابی بملا جهان زیر مرقوم گردید البته خواهد رسید
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @testing God
